stationContext.title: ED Chest Pain
stationContext.subtitle: Patient, spouse, and nurse in a time-boxed emergency department encounter.
stationContext.interruption: Nurse repeats vitals at minute seven
stationContext.initialDialogueText: Robert Hayes: It feels heavy, like someone is sitting on my chest.

dialogueTurns.text: Robert Hayes: I can tell you what has been happening if we go step by step.
Robert Hayes: There may be details I only mention if asked clearly.
Robert Hayes: I have noticed a few related symptoms that worry me.
Nurse Maria Alvarez: I can help review the available status information.
Nurse Maria Alvarez: I will help gather the next piece of clinical information.
Anna Hayes: I need to know when this becomes urgent.
Nurse Maria Alvarez: A clear shared plan will help the team respond.
Anna Hayes: Please include us in a way that supports the patient.
Robert Hayes: It helps when you acknowledge how stressful this feels.
System: Patient note saved for faculty review.
